description_long: This is a rectangular, vertically-oriented package of Ghirardelli Chocolate Squares, specifically the Milk & Caramel variety. The front face features a glossy image of individually wrapped chocolate squares with caramel filling, along with the Ghirardelli logo prominently displayed at the top in blue and white. The back of the package provides detailed product information, including a description, images of other available flavors, and a barcode. The sides of the package are narrow and triangular, with minimal graphics, mostly showing a continuation of the chocolate-themed design. The packaging appears to be made of cardboard with a glossy printed finish, and is likely sealed at the top and bottom. The overall appearance is premium and visually appealing, designed to attract attention in a retail or urban snack setting.
description: A glossy, rectangular Ghirardelli Milk & Caramel chocolate squares box with rich brown and gold graphics and prominent branding.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Ghirardelli logo, product name, and an image of the chocolate squares with caramel filling.
description_view_1: The left side view is narrow and triangular, displaying minimal graphics and mostly a dark, chocolate-themed background.
description_view_2: The back view features detailed product information, images of other flavors, and a barcode, with the Ghirardelli logo at the top.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with a narrow, triangular profile and minimal graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: The Ghirardelli logo is visible on the front and back, featuring a blue rectangle with white text and a gold eagle emblem above it.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package clearly states 'Milk & Caramel' and shows images of caramel-filled chocolate squares.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the package, including a nutrition facts panel and a list of ingredients.
